summary: Debounced GPIO button middleware with single-click, double-click, and long-press callbacks.
notes: Options can override active_low, debounce_ms, long_press_ms, and double_click_ms without editing templates.
Implement MultiButton_OnEvent(...) in AppCallbacks to keep business logic event-driven and non-blocking.
sources: Common embedded debounce and multi-click state-machine pattern.
